## Reference Anchors

- [View fusion vis-à-vis a Bayesian interpretation of Black-Litterman for portfolio allocation](../references/papers/2301.13594_black_litterman_fusion.pdf) - bayesian, portfolio
- [Playing Atari with Deep Reinforcement Learning](../references/papers/1312.5602_dqn.pdf) - rl
- [Proximal Policy Optimization Algorithms](../references/papers/1707.06347_ppo.pdf) - rl
- [Soft Actor-Critic Algorithms and Applications](../references/papers/1812.05905_sac.pdf) - rl
- [Adversarial Deep Reinforcement Learning in Portfolio Management](../references/papers/1808.09940_adversarial_drl_portfolio.pdf) - rl, portfolio
- [Model-based Deep Reinforcement Learning for Dynamic Portfolio Optimization](../references/papers/1901.08740_model_based_drl_portfolio.pdf) - rl, portfolio
- [Market Making with Deep Reinforcement Learning from Limit Order Books](../references/papers/2305.15821_market_making_rl_lob.pdf) - hft, rl

## Repo Coverage

- `src/features/builder.py` provides the technical feature baseline for the LightGBM path.
- `src/models/hmm.py` and `src/risk/manager.py` provide the regime/risk overlay used by the executable baseline.
- `src/brokers/paper.py`, `src/monitoring/health.py`, and `src/ingestion/websocket_client.py` now cover the broker + health + replay operational path.

## Implementation Notes

- 이 레포에는 RL trainer나 environment가 없으므로, RL 후보는 설계 문서와 실험 계획을 위한 inventory로 유지한다.
- paper/live safety gate와 health loop가 RL 산출물을 올릴 때의 운영 가드레일 역할을 한다.
